hero.subline: Software Engineer with practical experience in frontend and full stack web development, with strong focus on Angular, React.js, Next.js, JavaScript, TypeScript, and modern responsive web applications.

coach.name: Ruba Ismail Sliem
coach.role: Software Engineer | Frontend & Full Stack Developer | Mentor
coach.university: Bachelor in Computer Science, Menoufia University
snapshot: Junior Full Stack Web Developer with strong expertise in Angular, React.js, and Next.js
Experienced with Node.js through real project implementations
Strong foundation in JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3, Redux, and Context API
Skilled in responsive UI, performance optimization, SSR/SSG, and collaborative GitHub workflow
Has both software development experience and training experience in structured educational programs
achievements: Worked as a Full Stack Web Developer specializing in the MEARN stack
Completed intensive training in the MEARN Full Stack Development Track at ITI
Worked on clean, maintainable, and structured frontend and backend codebases
Has previous teaching and training experience through UCMAS and KENKEN programs
Built multiple real-world projects covering authentication, dashboards, search, cart flows, and payments
projects: Shipping Website — full stack platform to manage orders, shipments, user roles, and automated delivery cost calculation
Ecommerce Website App — full stack application with categories, search, product details, forms, authentication, favorites, cart, and Stripe payment flow
Trending Movie App — full stack app for discovering movies, TV shows, and actors with authentication and profile settings
Restaurant Website — React-based frontend app with cart, favorites, theme and language switching, login, and order flow
Cashier Website — frontend app for product listing, quantity control, kitchen order workflow, and notes handling
Meals Recipe Website — Angular app with categories, favorites, authentication, and meal-detail tutorial viewing

items.q: How can I request Ruba for coaching or training?
items.a: Use the WhatsApp button to send your training needs. Coach Academy will coordinate the suitable format, schedule, and learning goals.

items.q: What are Ruba’s main teaching and technical strengths?
items.a: Frontend development, Angular, React, Next.js, JavaScript, TypeScript, full stack project work, and practical learner-friendly guidance.

items.q: Does Ruba have project and teaching experience?
items.a: Yes. She has experience in both software development and structured training work, which makes her suitable for practical, guided learning sessions.

footer.blurb: Empowering talent through hands-on, industry-aligned tech coaching.
